reviews.comment:
Genial. Simplemente. Distinto. Limpio. Franquicia. Atención como en cualquier otro lugar, o punto YPF del país. Nada nuevo ni para criticar. Lo de siempre. No podemos quejarnos de todo, tampoco opinar mal porqué si nomás.

(Translated by Google)
Great. Simply. Different. Clean. Franchise. Service like anywhere else, or any other YPF station in the country. Nothing new or to criticize. The same old thing. We can't complain about everything, nor can we speak ill of it just for the sake of it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16076228542632319706/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURvdV92cjFBRRAB
